title: Pivot tables for pro plan
excerpt: Hi pivot tables are great and it is a petty you let us try and then they are not available for any of the “non corporate” plans, so for smaller than 25 users plans seems not an option.  If we use a tool like monday it is…

posts.author: elena (elena)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi pivot tables are great and it is a petty you let us try and then they are not available for any of the “non corporate” plans, so for smaller than 25 users plans seems not an option. If we use a tool like monday it is to be able to organize and analyse data. Greatfull if you could consider adding pivot tables to pro plan.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @elena - If you have a smaller number of users than 25, but still want Enterprise, please reach out to me at deb@polishedgeek.com.

As a certified monday partner, we can provide a private demo and walkthrough of Pro vs. Enterprise features, so you can decide if Enterprise is really right for your business. We are happy to provide detailed insights into the pros and cons of upgrading, including pricing and minimum seat requirements, how using Enterprise Item Permissions can streamline your boards and improve team collaboration, and a full discussion of the many security features included in Enterprise.

If Enterprise isn’t right for you after we’ve reviewed your business needs, we’ll honestly tell you so, plus provide expert recommendations on how to maximize the value of your plan if you choose to stay with Pro. We’ll tell it like it is, and help you get all the info you need to make an informed decision either way.

Of course, if you do choose to go with Enterprise, we provide complimentary training and onboarding sessions for your team to help you get started with all those exciting new features quickly. And as your partner, we also will work through our official monday channels to get you access as early as possible to any new Enterprise features that are in limited release or beta.

If you’d like to learn more, write me personally at deb@polishedgeek.com or book a private Enterprise demo here: Book Polished Geek: more with monday

posts.author: elena (elena)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks but i have been informed of the min price for enterprise and is x24 times what we are paying today, so pay that amount for pivot tables sounds too much.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @elena - Enterprise is generally about 2x to 3x the amount of Pro, depending on the seat count and whether you go monthly or annually, which has a large built-in discount. What plan are you using today? While I can’t post Enterprise pricing here on the forum as it’s always subject to change in the future, 24x increase doesn’t seem correct? Please feel free to reach out to me directly at deb@polishedgeek.com to make sure you have the right info for comparison.

Enjoy your monday․com adventures!

posts.author: CharlieWilliams (Charlie Williams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi deb@polishedgeek.com we currently pay £45 monthly for 3 staff and have been quoted $1000 a month to add just pivot tables! So about 16 times our current monthly charge. If you can create pivot tables for us for 2/3 times the £45 monthly charge then please let us know as we really would like this feature, but don’t want to pay a ridiculous amount for it.
I will also email you directly regarding this.

posts.author: emmabee (Emma Butt)
posts.cookedHtml: New to Monday this month (pro plan) and also very surprised at the exclusivity of pivot tables which I consider a very basic day to day function, applicable to small scale business just as much as larger scale. In fact the ad I first encountered for Monday asked “managing your business with spreadsheets?” yes indeed I am and they all have pivot tables on them!

posts.author: rwilliams (Robert Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: @emmabee Haha. Great Point. It’s yet another head scratcher from the Monday team.
